name: Deglycyrrhizinated Licorice
summary: Deglycyrrhizinated licorice removes glycyrrhizin to reduce mineralocorticoid risk; evidence for ulcer symptoms is limited and older.
description: Deglycyrrhizinated licorice removes glycyrrhizin while retaining non-glycyrrhizin components, aiming for mucosal-related support without glycyrrhizin-driven mineralocorticoid effects.
safetyNotes: Safer than whole licorice regarding pseudoaldosteronism; generally well tolerated.
